meaning: n.谈话,演讲adj.讲话的,适于说的,象要开口似的
examples: She was clearly speaking the truth.
She has a beautiful speaking voice.
She began speaking politely, even correctly.
"The leader of the coalition has been speaking about his interest in dialogue, " Mr Lavrov said.
So have young Kurds, though their political leaders have been wary of speaking out.
